name: Broken Compass
descs:
First Turn Start of a wave: randomly inflict (5 + (# of enemies x 3)) [Sinking] Count between all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
(For Abnormalities, only the Core counts as an enemy)

First Turn Start of a wave: randomly inflict (10 + (# of enemies x 3)) [Sinking] Count between all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
(For Abnormalities, only the Core counts as an enemy).

First Turn Start of a wave: randomly inflict (10 + (# of enemies x 4)) [Sinking] Count between all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
(For Abnormalities, only the Core counts as an enemy).
